text: Uh, I'm smoking on the cat piss

a young nigga with money would make

never show off to niggas that's hungry and eager,
My brother's keeper, I'm loyal its all in my demeanor

that's why I don't let opinions affect me, I do what I wanna do,
they do or they don't expect me, they expect me to give up,

in this homeless world we live in, what you give is what you given

and keep yo palms hitching, gotta pay mom a visit,
damn it been awhile, I been working, she keep telling me,

then I spend around,
she say I'm always movin', MA I just can't sit around

so instead of makin it hard, I made it fun for us, make it easy,
so when you need it, you just run to us,
but its a lot of pressure I'm tryna stick and move through this shit
